message:
fix(extensions): support backtick-quoted strings in import/require/pi.tool regex patterns

- import_dynamic_regex(), require_regex(), pi_tool_regex(): extend string
  delimiters from ["'] to ["'\`] to match template literal syntax used by
  some extensions (e.g. import(\`module\`), require(\`pkg\`))
- Update 3 test constructor sites with manager_snapshot and
  manager_snapshot_version fields added in prior commit
- README.md: document installer regression harness invocation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
